clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: An existing Dwelling may be Altered and used as a Duplex, Semi-detached or a Multi-unit Dwelling provided that:
The Building is structurally sound and the conversion satisfies the requirements under the City of Charlottetown Building Code By-law.
The conversion can be undertaken without extreme Alterations or Additions excepting the construction or addition of new windows, fire escapes and outside stairways;
The number of Dwelling Units permitted shall be consistent with that which is permitted for an Apartment Dwelling.
Notwithstanding the requirements, the following are permitted as accessory or secondary uses:
